# Copilot Instructions

## Product Intent

This project aims to replace ever having to log in to Skoleintra manually.

## Notification Content Policy

- Do not truncate or summarize message bodies in notifications.
- Do not implement preview-style message delivery by default.
- Preserve full message content so users can rely on notifications as the primary reading surface.
- Any feature that reduces message completeness should be treated as a regression unless explicitly requested.
